title: veronica spicata subsp. viscosula
intro: Veronica spicata subsp. viscosula, also known as sticky speedwell or sticky broomrape, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as sore throats, coughs, and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Veronica spicata subsp. viscosula include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe irritated mucous membranes. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate cold and flu symptoms.
